mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_message (title, content, message_type, priority, sender_type, sender_id, receiver_type, status, create_by, create_time, deleted, remark) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{messageType}, #{priority}, #{senderType}, #{senderId}, #{receiverType}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, 0, #{remark})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_message
title = #{title}, content = #{content}, message_type = #{messageType}, priority = #{priority}, sender_type = #{senderType}, sender_id = #{senderId}, receiver_type = #{receiverType}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_message SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_message WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
